title: Aliran Kenangan di Pinggir Sungai
theme: Mengeksplorasi bagaimana kenangan lama bisa muncul di tengah rutinitas sederhana, membawa rasa melankolis namun damai.

cover.prompt: A tranquil river at sunset, bathed in a radiant golden glow that shimmers on the calm water surface. A grand, leafy trembesi tree frames one side of the river bank, its branches extending gracefully. Under its peaceful embrace, a solitary elderly figure is seated, a simple form with a wooden cane beside them, facing the gentle current. The scene is composed with a wide shot, shallow depth of field, emphasizing the serene landscape and the warm, ethereal atmosphere. Soft, diffused lighting highlights the golden hues of the setting sun.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: An elderly man sitting by a tranquil river is transported back to his youth by a sudden memory triggered by a reflection and children's laughter. He reflects on a lost love and missed opportunities, experiencing a wave of bittersweet nostalgia and regret. Immersing himself in these memories, he finds new clarity and ultimately accepts his past, discovering peace in his present reality.
meta.target_emotion: melancholy, nostalgia, peace, acceptance, slight regret
